demo.page.h2: See Gradvera on your own offers.
demo.page.intro: We'll walk through how Gradvera fits the way your estimating team already works — using your historical pricing, not a generic template.
demo.page.steps: Send the form — have a couple of your recent offers in mind.
We set up a working session on your own pricing and data.
You watch Gradvera build an offer, then decide. No obligation.
demo.page.reassure: A person replies, not a bot
demo.form.message: What would you like to see?
demo.form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about the offers you prepare...
demo.form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again, or email info@digitalsolutions.si.
demo.form.errEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
demo.form.consent: We use your details only to arrange your demo — never for unsolicited marketing.
demo.success.p: We'll be in touch shortly to arrange a demo on your own offers.
consent.title: We respect your privacy
consent.body: We use cookies to understand how the site is used and to improve it. You can accept analytics cookies or continue with only the essentials.
